MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Continued To Jan-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROWEN MADAMBA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to January 9, 2013. Plaintiff shall provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with department 302 by December 7 per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff shall please attach a cover letter to those papers indicating the new hearing date. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
